god-love.en: God's love is unconditional and sacrificial. John 3:16 shows that God loved the world so much that He gave His only Son.
god-love.fr: L'amour de Dieu est inconditionnel et sacrificiel. Jean 3:16 montre que Dieu a tant aimé le monde qu'il a donné son Fils unique.
god-love.sw: Upendo wa Mungu hauna masharti na ni wa kujitolea. Yohana 3:16 inaonyesha kwamba Mungu aliupenda ulimwengu kiasi cha kumtoa Mwanawe pekee.
god-love.ar: محبة الله غير مشروطة وذبيحية. يوحنا ٣: ١٦ تظهر أن الله أحب العالم كثيراً حتى بذل ابنه الوحيد.
god-love.yo: Ife Olorun ko ni opin ati ẹbọ. Johannu 3:16 fihan pe Olorun feran aye tobẹẹ ti o fi fi Ọmọ rẹ kanṣoṣo fun.
god-love.ig: Ịhụnanya Chineke enweghị atụ na ịchụ àjà. Jọn 3:16 na-egosi na Chineke hụrụ ụwa n'anya nke ukwuu nye otu Ọkpara ya.
god-love.ha: Ƙaunar Allah ba ta da iyaka kuma tana da sadaukarwa. Yahaya 3:16 ya nuna cewa Allah ya ƙaunaci duniya har ya ba da Ɗansa kaɗai.
god-love.pcm: God love no get end and na sacrifice. John 3:16 show say God love di world well well give im only Son.

sin-problem.en: Sin is anything that falls short of God's perfect standard. Romans 3:23 reminds us that all have sinned.

jesus-solution.en: Jesus is God's solution to our sin problem. While we were still sinners, Christ died for us (Romans 5:8).

faith-response.en: Faith is trusting in Jesus alone for salvation. Ephesians 2:8-9 clarifies that salvation is by grace through faith.

new-life.en: When we accept Jesus, we become new creations. 2 Corinthians 5:17 promises that the old has gone and the new is here.

trinity.en: The Trinity is the Christian doctrine that God exists as three distinct Persons—Father, Son, and Holy Spirit.

scripture.en: The Bible is God's inspired, authoritative Word—completely true and reliable. 2 Timothy 3:16 teaches that all Scripture is God-breathed.

suffering.en: God doesn't promise a life without suffering, but He promises to be with us in it and work it for good. Romans 8:28 assures us.

only-way.en: Jesus is the exclusive way to God because He alone is both fully God and fully human—the only mediator between God and humanity.

salvation-prayer.en: The prayer of salvation is a simple confession of faith in Jesus. Romans 10:9 outlines it.

holy-spirit.en: The Holy Spirit is God's presence in believers, empowering us for holy living and witness. Acts 1:8 promises power.

great-commission.en: The Great Commission is Jesus' final command to make disciples of all nations.

love-neighbor.en: Loving your neighbor means actively showing God's love to others through practical acts of service, kindness, and forgiveness.

forgiveness.en: Forgiveness is releasing resentment toward someone who has wronged you, just as God forgave you in Christ.

eternal-hope.en: Eternal hope is the confident expectation of God's promises for the future, including resurrection, eternal life with God.
